meaning: she argues with you (subject of سَمِعَ)
her husband (concerning whom she is arguing)
and Allah (as the subject doing something)
he hears (Allah hears in this ayah)
indeed/verily (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ)
Allah (as the object of يَسْمَعُ - hears)
Those who (referring to people who يُظٰهِرُونَ - do zihar)
they declare (about their wives) (subject of ٱلَّذِينَ)
not (negating that these wives are their mothers)
those who (feminine plural, referring to أُمَّهٰتِهِمْ - their mothers)
of the speech (part of مِّنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ meaning 'of/from the speech')
they return (referring to those who make ظِهَار)
to what (connects to قَالُوا - they said)
that (connects to يَتَمَآسَّا - they touch each other)
that is for you all (referring to the ruling about freeing a slave mentioned before)
you (all) are being advised (about what you said)
you all do/work (describing what Allah knows about in this ayah)
he finds (in conditional phrase with لَّمْ)
from (connects قَبْلِ to what comes before it)
before (follows مِن and comes before أَن)

then feeding (connected to يَسْتَطِعْ - is able)
so that you (all) believe (in اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ)
in/by/with Allah (connected to لِتُؤْمِنُوا - so that you believe)
of Allah (connected to لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ - so that you believe)
Allah (as the object of يُحَآدُّونَ - oppose)
just as/like what (comparing what happened to كُبِتُوا۟ with what happened to those before them)
before them (referring to those who opposed Allah and His Messenger)
and indeed/and already (emphasizes the verb أَنزَلْنَآ)
we sent down (referring to the divine revelations)
the Day (when Allah will resurrect them)
he raises them up (subject is اللَّهُ)
all together (describes how Allah will raise them)
and then He will inform them thoroughly (about what they did)
with what/by what (connects to عَمِلُوٓا۟ - they did)
they did/worked (subject of يُنَبِّئُهُم - He will inform them)
He (Allah) kept perfect count of it (referring to what they did)
and Allah (as the subject of يَبْعَثُ - He raises)
a witness (describing Allah in this ayah)
that (connects أَلَمْ تَرَ to what follows)
Allah (the direct object of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
whatever/that which (connects to يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
in (location word for ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - the heavens)
and what (connects to يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
secret conversation (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
of three (feminine, used for counting things)
except (connects هُوَ رَابِعُهُمْ with what came before)
He (referring to Allah as the sixth one with any group of five people)
their fourth one (referring to Allah being the fourth one present with three people)
five (in a private conversation with others)
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
more numerous (than what is mentioned before)
except (excludes هُوَ/He from the previous statement)
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
with them (referring to the group being discussed in the ayah)
where (asking about location of مَا كَانُوا - wherever they were)
then (connects this part about Allah informing them to the previous part about Allah being with them)
with what (connects to يُنَبِّئُهُم - He will inform them)
the resurrection (connected to يَوْمَ - Day of)
Allah (as the object being described as knowing everything in this verse)
Did not...? (connects to تَرَ meaning 'you see')
you see (in a question with أَلَمْ)
they return (referring to those who were forbidden)
from him/it (referring to what they were forbidden from)
and they whisper secretly with each other
and the severe hostility/transgression (connected to بِٱلْإِثْمِ)
and when (connects to previous actions and introduces condition for يَقُولُونَ - they say)
they greeted you (object of جَآءُوكَ - when they came to you)
not (negates يُحَيِّكَ - did not greet you)
with it (referring to the greeting they use)
Allah (The One True God) (subject of يُعَذِّبُ - punishes)
their selves/souls (they say this within يَقُولُونَ)
if only/why not (expressing wish in يَقُولُونَ)
with what (used to greet رَسُولَ اللَّهِ)
we say (in response to what they say)
their sufficiency (what is sufficient for them)
Hell (as the subject of يَصْلَوْنَهَا - they will burn in it)
the destination (subject of بِئْسَ - how evil!)
you all spoke privately with each other
with/by the sin (object of تَتَنٰجَوْا۟ - secret conversations)
and they whispered secretly to each other
with the goodness, righteousness, or virtue
and is not (connected to لِيَحْزُنَ - that he may grieve)
except/unless (excluding what comes after from what came before)
of Allah (connected to بِإِذْنِ - by permission)
O you all (calling to a group)
they believed (those who اللَّهُ will raise in ranks)
you all make space for yourselves (in the gathering)
in the sitting places (connected to فِى)
to you all (object of قِيلَ - 'it was said')
and when (connects to قِيلَ - it is said)
all of you rise up! (command to group)
so rise up, all of you! (command to group)
Allah (the one true God who will expand for you)
those who, the ones who (referring to believers in this ayah)
they believed (those who Allah raises in ranks)
from/among you all (refers to those who believe in ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
and those who (who were given knowledge)
they were given (subject of يَرْفَعِ - Allah raises)
the knowledge (object of أُوتُوا - were given)
and Allah (as the doer of يَرْفَعِ - raises/elevates)
you all act/work (in response to what Allah has commanded)
when (referring to future events, used before نٰجَيْتُمُ)
you all had a secret talk (with الرَّسُولَ - the Messenger)
the messenger (object of نٰجَيْتُمُ - you have private conversation with)
a charitable giving (before نَجْوَىٰكُمْ - your private conversation)
and more pure (connected to خَيْرٌ - better)
so indeed/then certainly (connects to لَّمْ تَجِدُوا۟ - if you do not find)
Allah (as the object of فَإِنَّ - 'then surely')
a constantly and intensely merciful one
charitable gifts (object of تُقَدِّمُوا - you present)
and he returned back (subject of the sentence)
and (you all) obey! (command to اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ)
Allah (as the object of وَأَطِيعُوا۟ - and obey)

you (all) do/work (present tense, addressing multiple people)
a people (object of تَوَلَّوْا٬ they befriended)
he became angry (subject of Allah's anger)
upon them (referring to قَوْمًا/the people mentioned)
not (negating هُم مِّنكُمْ - they are from you)
they/them (referring to the hypocrites mentioned earlier)
from them (referring to the people who turned to those upon whom Allah is angry)
and they make oaths (connected to يَعْلَمُونَ - they know)
indeed they (subject of سَآءَ - how evil is)
they took for themselves (acts on أَيْمٰنَهُمْ)
a shield/protection (object of اتَّخَذُوا - they took)
so they blocked/turned away (from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ)
a punishment (subject of فَلَهُمْ - for them is)
she/it will benefit/avail (negated by لَّن before أَمْوٰل)
their wealth (will not avail them against Allah)
in it (feminine, referring to النَّارِ/the Fire)
those who last forever (in accusative case)
day (object of يَبْعَثُهُمُ - He will resurrect them)
he sends them forth (Allah sends forth all of them)
Allah (as the subject of يَبْعَثُ - He resurrects)
all together (describing how Allah will raise them in يَبْعَثُهُمُ)
and so they make an oath (as a result of يَبْعَثُهُمُ - He resurrects them)
just as, like what (they swear to you like what they swear to Him)
and they count/consider (what they say to اللَّهِ)
that they (think they are upon شَىْءٍ - something)
beware/indeed (introducing the statement إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْكٰذِبُونَ - 'indeed they are the liars')
he sought complete control (of عَلَيْهِمُ - over them)
and he made them forget (Allah's remembrance)
Listen! Pay attention! (introducing the warning about حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطٰنِ)
indeed/verily (emphasizes the sentence ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ that follows)
those who (plural - describing يُحَآدُّونَ 'those who oppose')
they oppose/resist strongly (referring to those who oppose Allah and His Messenger)
and His messenger (object of يُحَآدُّونَ - oppose)
I (in the context of 'I and My messengers will prevail')
Allah (the one true God who is being denied by the disbelievers)
never/absolutely not (negates تَجِدُ - you will find)
you find (subject addressing someone in قَوْمًا)
any people (object of تَجِدُ - you find)
in/by/with Allah (object of يُؤْمِنُونَ - they believe)
and the day (connected to الْآخِرِ - the Last)
they show mutual love/friendship with (referring to those who love Allah's enemies)
opposed/resisted (object of يُوَآدُّونَ - they have affection for)
Allah (the One True God) (object of يُؤْمِنُونَ - they believe in)
and even if (connects this hypothetical situation to what came before)
those specific ones (pointing to something far) (subject of حِزْبُ)
and He strengthened them (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)
with a spirit (connected to وَأَيَّدَهُم - and He supported them)

those who stay forever (describing their state in Paradise)
from/about them (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)
indeed/truly (emphasizes that حِزْبَ ٱللَّهِ are the successful ones)
